projects.description: This is a project for a local business that specilies in the selling and maintiance of machines that help with the manufacturing of circuit boards. This applcation was to help manage one part of the buisness which is the inventory of feeders. At anyone time there could be thousands of feeders all with individual serial codes being logged in a spreadsheet with high margins of errors. </br>
projects.skills: Typescript, Adinos JS, Electron, React, MySql
